S.FORM: == satangahan == u zuma a sulit hemhem ŚŅćŤÄź ahebed Ś†ÖśĮÖ u zuma a kamu u kamu nu hulam:Ś†ÖśĮÖ,ŚŅćŤÄź u kamu nu Amilika:perseverance; patience
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan == u zuma a sur~…ĺit ńß…ômńß…ôm ** ańß…ôb…ôd ** u zuma a kamu u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**,** u kamu nu amir~…ĺika:p…ôrs…ô*…ôran ¶…ô; pati…ôn ¶…ô
